title: Boss Checklist
description: Adds a convenient list of bosses with brief information about them.
body:
# 📖 Description

**Boss Checklist** adds a list of all bosses from your modpack to the game, which can be opened by pressing the keybind or the button in the pause menu.

The menu displays all bosses from various mods, which you can mark as defeated, or they will be marked automatically if the mod is installed on the server. For each boss, you can view their model/image, mod name, drops, spawn info, and other additional info.

This mod is primarily **client-side**, but can be installed on the **server** to automatically mark defeated bosses and keep track of recent battles.


<details>
<summary>ℹ️ Compatibility</summary>

The list currently contains **171** bosses and minibosses, arranged in a logical order from easiest to hardest. However, this isn't definitive, so if you think the order is wrong, you can let me know on GitHub or move a boss with Alt + mouse wheel scroll.
  
# Currently supported bosses include:
- AdventureZ
- Aether: Lost Content Addon
- Alex's Mobs
- Alex's Caves
- Ancient Elements
- Aquamirae
- Armageddon
- Ars Nouveau
- Arthropocolypse
- Beneath the Wetlands
- Blue Skies
- Born in Chaos
- Bosses of Mass Destruction
- Bosses'Rise
- Call From The Depth
- Call of Yucutan
- Companions!
- Confluence: Otherworld
- Cracker's Wither Storm Mod
- Dark Doppelganger: Iron's Spells and Spellbooks Addon
- Deep Aether
- Deeper and Darker
- Dungeon Now Loading 2%
- Dungeons And Combat
- EEEAB's Mobs
- Ender Trigon
- Epic Fight - The Wraithon
- Friends&Foes
- Frostiful
- Galosphere
- Goety - The Dark Arts
- H's Bosses
- Illage and Spillage
- Illager Invasion
- Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
- Knight Quest
- Legendary Monsters
- L Ender's Cataclysm
- Marium's Soulslike Weaponry
- Mine Cells
- Mofu's Broken Constellation
- Monster Expansion
- Mowzie's Mobs
- Mutant Monsters
- Mutant More
- Myths & Legends
- Qilpoth Awakening
- Rediscovered
- Remnant Bosses
- Sleepy Hollows
- Terramity
- The Aether
- The Conjurer
- The Graveyard
- The Twilight Forest
- T.O Magic 'n Extras - Iron's Spells Addon
- Unusual End
- Wither: Reincarnated

and the vanilla ones.

</details>


<details>
<summary>📋 How to edit the list?</summary>

Since version 5.0, the mod has an editor menu where you can add a new boss. Additionally, by holding Alt and scrolling the mouse wheel, you can change the boss's position in the checklist.

You can create an addon using the files from config/boss_checklist/overlap/; details are on the [wiki](https://github.com/yori3o/BossChecklist/wiki/A-quick-guide-to-adding-or-editing-bosses).

</details>


<details>
<summary>🛠️ Configuration</summary>

- **Client:** You can enable or disable progression mode, search bar, and the open button in the pause menu. The file also allows you to disable in-game settings menu, animations, some gui elements and y offset of the open button.
- **Server:** You can disable statistics, saving the name of the boss killer and multithreading.

</details>


<details>
<summary>⚙️ Commands</summary>

_**/boss_checklist set_defeated namespace:id true/false**_ – a server command that allows you to mark bosses for all players in the world (new players will also have them marked.)

</details>


**If you found a bug or have any suggestions, please submit an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/yori3o/BossChecklist).**
